description: The animation presents a calming movement of blurred color spots that is similar to a lava lamp. It does not perfectly resemble a lava lamp though. The colors change and there does not seem to be a sense of physics present. The color spots slowly move around the screen and sometimes merge with each other. The whole thing is very blurry. New spots slowly appear from the sides of a screen with a different color. The animation continues indefinitely and is relatively randomized.
